name: Draconic Bloodline
description: Your magic comes from draconic ancestry, granting resilience and elemental power.

1.name: Draconic Resilience
1.description: Your hit point maximum increases by 1 per sorcerer level, and your base AC becomes 13 + Dexterity modifier while not wearing armor.

6.name: Elemental Affinity
6.description: Add Charisma modifier to one damage roll of spells matching your draconic ancestry element; spend 1 sorcery point for temporary resistance.

14.name: Dragon Wings
14.description: You can sprout dragon wings and gain a flying speed.

18.name: Draconic Presence
18.description: Spend sorcery points to radiate an aura of awe or fear.
